label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatogonia > undifferentiated spermatogonia
text: Undifferentiated spermatogonia are early germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with spermatogonial maintenance before differentiation and meiotic progression.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatogonia > differentiating spermatogonia
text: Differentiating spermatogonia are committed spermatogonial germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with progression from progenitor states toward meiotic entry.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > preleptotene
text: Preleptotene spermatocytes are early meiotic germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with meiotic entry before leptotene stage.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > leptotene
text: Leptotene spermatocytes are meiotic prophase I germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with leptotene-stage chromosome organization.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > zygotene
text: Zygotene spermatocytes are meiotic prophase I germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with zygotene-stage synapsis progression.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > pachytene
text: Pachytene spermatocytes are meiotic prophase I germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with pachytene-stage meiotic progression.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > diplotene
text: Diplotene spermatocytes are late meiotic prophase I germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with diplotene-stage progression before meiotic division.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > late meiotic cell
text: Late meiotic cells are late-stage meiotic germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with unresolved late meiotic substages in harmonized annotations.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatid > early spermatid
text: Early spermatids are post-meiotic germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with initial spermiogenic differentiation after meiosis.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatid > intermediate spermatid
text: Intermediate spermatids are spermiogenic germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with transition between early and late spermatid states.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatid > late spermatid
text: Late spermatids are advanced spermiogenic germ cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with maturation toward sperm morphology.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > Sertoli cell
text: Sertoli cells are somatic support cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with germline niche support and seminiferous microenvironment regulation.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > Leydig cell
text: Leydig cells are interstitial somatic cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with steroidogenic programs in testis tissue.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > immune cell > macrophage
text: Macrophages are immune somatic cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with local immune surveillance and phagocytic activity.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > endothelial cell
text: Endothelial cells are vascular somatic cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with blood vessel lining and vascular interface maintenance.
notes: example original label alias from mapping table

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > stromal cell
text: Stromal cells are interstitial somatic support cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with structural support and local extracellular matrix organization.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > myoid / vascular smooth muscle-like cell
text: Myoid / vascular smooth muscle-like cells are peritubular contractile somatic cells in zebrafish testis. They are associated with peritubular support and vascular smooth-muscle-like states.
notes: maps short and long labels to one harmonized class
